response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong alignment to the required technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker) and additional relevant skills (Kotlin/Java, PostgreSQL). His work on scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and cross-functional tooling aligns well with the role's responsibilities, particularly in enterprise automation and internal tooling.
strengths: Deep full-stack expertise with proven scalability experience
Direct experience with AI-agent development and MCP integration
Strong problem-solving and architecture contributions across domains
concerns: Primary stack focus leans toward Node.js/JavaScript rather than Nest.js
Limited public evidence of React + Vitest proficiency in recent roles
Mixed exposure to secondary stack (e.g., Kotlin/Java at lower frequency)

key_factors.factor: Primary stack alignment with minor gaps
